content.full_text:
October 1, 2010

Shirley Hansen
Richmond District Democratic Club
2831 Cabrillo Street
San Francisco, California 94121

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-10-165

Dear Ms. Hansen:

This letter is in response to your request for assistance on behalf of the Richmond District Democratic Club, regarding the Political Reform Act (the "Act"). You asked about potential liability that the club might incur if the club released its membership list to a member. No provision of the Act applies to this issue. Since your inquiry primarily presents issues which are outside the purview of the Political Reform Act ("Act"), under the provisions of Regulation 18329(b)(8)(D), your request for advice, must be declined.

Should you need assistance in the future, you may contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel
Legal Division
